name: conventional-commits
description: Create, review, and validate Git commit messages using Conventional Commits 1.0.0.

interface.longDescription: Create, review, rewrite, and validate Git commit messages according to the Conventional Commits 1.0.0 specification, including type, scope, breaking-change markers, body, and footer guidance.
defaultPrompt: Write a conventional commit message for my staged changes.
Review this commit message for Conventional Commits.
